title: One paper from our lab have been accepted at The IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2026 — 𝘾𝙊𝙍𝙀 𝘼* 𝙧𝙖𝙣𝙠 conference in computer vision!
One paper from our lab have been accepted at International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) 2026 — 𝘾𝙊𝙍𝙀 𝘼* 𝙧𝙖𝙣𝙠 conference in computer vision!
One paper from our lab have been accepted at Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV) 2026 — 𝘾𝙊𝙍𝙀 𝘼-𝙧𝙖𝙣𝙠 conference in computer vision!
Two papers from our lab in the field of 𝙢𝙚𝙙𝙞𝙘𝙖𝙡 𝙞𝙢𝙖𝙜𝙚 𝙨𝙚𝙜𝙢𝙚𝙣𝙩𝙖𝙩𝙞𝙤𝙣 have been accepted at 36th British Machine Vision Conference 2025 — 𝘾𝙊𝙍𝙀 𝘼-𝙧𝙖𝙣𝙠 conference in computer vision!
One Paper (Multi-Attribute Bias Mitigation via Representation Learning) from our lab has been accepted at 28th European Conference on Artificial Intelligence (ECAI) 2025, 𝘾𝙊𝙍𝙀 𝘼-𝙧𝙖𝙣𝙠 conference.
Ms Sana Afreen joined VisDom Lab as Project Associate
Parinita Nema has been awarded a prestigious ACM-W scholarships to attend the IEEE/CVF WACV 2025 in the USA!
Dr. Rini Smita Thakur has been awarded two prestigious scholarships (WACV 2025 DEI Scholarship, ANRF-ITS Travel Grant) to attend the IEEE/CVF WACV 2025 in the USA!
𝟯 𝗽𝗮𝗽𝗲𝗿𝘀 from our lab have been accepted at IEEE/CVF 𝗪𝗔𝗖𝗩 𝟮𝟬𝟮𝟱, a prestigious 𝘾𝙊𝙍𝙀 𝘼-𝙧𝙖𝙣𝙠 conference in computer vision!
Praharsh Nanavati (MS @ VisDom) joined IISc as JRF
Rajeev receives the prestigious TCS Research Scholarship (RSP)
